description: The Zephyr docks with the Remorath mothership, triggering alarms. Talbot perceives the arrival as mutiny and accuses Coulson of betrayal. The tension quickly turns dangerous as Talbot takes control of the situation and the team is caught between rescuing Coulson and confronting Talbot's instability.

transcript.line: Quinn's team originally found gravitonium at the bottom of one of his mines.
Sensors indicate an unseen object has breached our hull.
Cloaking. What is S.H.I.E.L.D. doing here?
This is mutiny! You made contact behind my back.
They're here to do what? Take my ship?
You're a liar! You're a liar! Did you have any part in this?
I told Coulson not to do it, he wouldn't listen to me.
Find the intruders and take them out.
They're here to help. What are you doing? Glenn, don't do this.
You have betrayed me for the last time, Phil. Whatever happens next is on you.
